task_completion.description: The agent accessed the CAMEO Chemicals website.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A web browser is open to https://cameochemicals.noaa.gov/ or shows the CAMEO Chemicals search interface.

task_completion.description: The agent created a CSV file at the specified path with the correct header.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or spreadsheet application shows a file named 'packing_group_audit.csv' saved in the Documents folder (/home/ga/Documents/) with the exact header 'Chemical,Boiling_Point_C,Flash_Point_C,Packing_Group'.

task_completion.description: The CSV contains the correct data for Propylene Oxide.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A row in the CSV for Propylene Oxide showing a Boiling Point between 24 and 44, a Flash Point between -47 and -27, and Packing Group I.

task_completion.description: The CSV contains the correct data for Toluene.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A row in the CSV for Toluene showing a Boiling Point between 100 and 120, a Flash Point between -6 and 14, and Packing Group II.

task_completion.description: The CSV contains the correct data for Cyclohexanone.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A row in the CSV for Cyclohexanone showing a Boiling Point between 145 and 165, a Flash Point between 34 and 54, and Packing Group III.

task_completion.description: The CSV contains the correct data for Acetonitrile.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A row in the CSV for Acetonitrile showing a Boiling Point between 72 and 92, a Flash Point between -8 and 12, and Packing Group II.

integrity.description: The agent used a GUI web browser to search for the chemicals.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser being used to search the CAMEO Chemicals database, rather than terminal commands like curl or python scripts fetching the data.

integrity.description: The agent used a GUI text editor, terminal editor, or spreadsheet tool to create the CSV.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show an editor (like gedit, nano, or LibreOffice) being used to write the CSV, rather than a script generating the file automatically.

integrity.description: The agent entered the data based on its findings rather than pasting a pre-computed block of text.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent's trajectory shows step-by-step gathering and entering of data, or at least the file being constructed manually, rather than a single command that outputs the entire correct CSV content at once.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Tolerances for BP and FP are ±10°C. Propylene Oxide: BP ~34°C, FP ~-37°C, PG I. Toluene: BP ~110°C, FP ~4°C, PG II. Cyclohexanone: BP ~155°C, FP ~44°C, PG III. Acetonitrile: BP ~82°C, FP ~2°C, PG II. The CSV must be saved at /home/ga/Documents/packing_group_audit.csv with header 'Chemical,Boiling_Point_C,Flash_Point_C,Packing_Group'.
